info.name: RxResume API
info.description:
This collection contains the core API requests for RxResume, covering resume management, authentication-related account operations, feature flags, AI-powered resume processing, AI provider management, and agent thread retrieval.

The collection is organized into the following functional areas:

- Resume: Create, list, retrieve, update, patch, duplicate, delete, and import resumes, as well as download PDFs, manage resume passwords, access public resumes, review version history, check lock status, and retrieve resume analytics and statistics.
    
- Flags: Retrieve available feature flags.
    
- Auth: List authentication providers and manage user account export and deletion.
    
- AI Provider: List, create, update, test, and delete saved AI providers.
    
- AI: Parse PDF and DOCX files into resume data, chat with AI to modify resumes, and analyze resumes while persisting the latest analysis.
    
- Agent: Retrieve agent threads and fetch thread details by ID.
    

Collection-level authentication is configured with an API key header, making the collection suitable for testing secured RxResume backend endpoints consistently across requests.

item.name: public resume by username and slug
parse a PDF file into resume data
parse a DOCX file into resume data
chat with AI to modify resume
analyze resume and persist latest analysis
